Title: Hardcoded fallback mobile number
Description: guestMobile defaults to '9000000000' when blank — corrupts GuestProfile upsert and masks missing data
Notes: Should either require mobile or mark booking as walk-in-anonymous

Title: ID Proof entry missing from walk-in sale
Description: No idProofType or idProofNumber fields in POS walk-in form even though Booking schema has them
Notes: Schema fields: idProofType (enum), idProofNumber (String?)

Title: Manual discount entry missing
Description: No way for staff to apply a manual/staff discount with a reason field
Notes: discountAmount already in schema and API — just not exposed in UI

Title: Booking search tab missing
Description: Customer who already booked should be look-up-able by booking number or mobile in POS
Notes: booking-lookup API at /api/v1/pos/booking-lookup already exists

Title: SALES_EXECUTIVE blocked from ticket-sale API
Description: requireSubRole only allows TICKET_COUNTER but POS hub also shows ticket terminal to SALES_EXECUTIVE
Notes: Fix: add SALES_EXECUTIVE to requireSubRole call

Title: SALES_EXECUTIVE blocked from booking-lookup API
Description: booking-lookup only allows TICKET_COUNTER — SALES_EXECUTIVE cannot look up bookings
Notes: Fix: add SALES_EXECUTIVE

Title: Food POS terminal page missing
Description: POS hub links to /staff/pos/food but the page component does not exist
Notes: Backend food API routes exist at /api/v1/food/

Title: FoodTerminal component missing
Description: No component for F&B staff to take orders at the POS
Notes: Similar pattern to LockerTerminal and CostumeTerminal

Title: No duplicate scan protection on ride access
Description: Same QR scanned twice within seconds creates two RideAccessLog entries; no idempotency key
Notes: Add scanId or dedupe by (bookingId + rideId + rounded-timestamp)

Title: Re-entry allowed silently
Description: CHECKED_IN bookings return reEntry:true and succeed — design allows re-entry but no alert is logged
Notes: Should log a security audit event for re-entry scans

Title: No discountReason or discountApprovedBy on Booking
Description: discountAmount exists but no audit trail of who approved a manual discount or why
Notes: Add discountReason String? and discountApprovedById String? fields

Title: No reconciledBy/reconciledAt on PosSession
Description: variance field exists but no reconciliation audit trail
Notes: Add reconciledById, reconciledAt, discrepancyReason fields

Title: FoodItem has no inventory/stock quantity field
Description: isAvailable is boolean-only; no way to track how many units are in stock or trigger low-stock
Notes: Add stockQuantity Int? and lowStockThreshold Int? to FoodItem

Title: LockerZone missing total capacity field
Description: Cannot query zone-level occupancy as percentage without counting all locker rows
Notes: Add totalCount Int? field

Title: No aggregate stock count on CostumeCategory
Description: Must COUNT CostumeItem rows to know total inventory; should have denormalized totalStock
Notes: Add totalStock Int @default(0) to CostumeCategory

Title: Revenue report endpoint is a stub
Description: Returns {message: 'TODO'} — no revenue analytics implemented
Notes: Needs: daily/monthly revenue by payment method, category, outlet

Title: Footfall report endpoint is a stub
Description: Returns {message: 'TODO'} — no guest capacity/headcount analytics implemented
Notes: Needs: entries by date/hour, peak period identification

Title: Guest registration API is a stub
Description: GET /api/v1/auth/register returns {message: 'TODO'}
Notes: Needs: create User + GuestProfile from form data

Title: WhatsApp webhook handler is a stub
Description: POST /api/v1/webhooks/whatsapp accepts but ignores all incoming messages
Notes: Needs: parse Gupshup webhook events and trigger appropriate flows

Title: Gupshup SMS/WhatsApp integration unimplemented
Description: lib/gupshup.ts is empty except a TODO comment
Notes: Needs: send message wrapper using Gupshup REST API

Title: File upload handler is a stub
Description: GET /api/v1/upload returns {message: 'TODO'}
Notes: Used for UPI screenshots and costume/maintenance images; needs S3/R2/local storage

Title: Single-transaction booking for tickets + rides + locker + costume + food
Description: Guests should be able to buy everything at gate in one transaction; QR used at each area
Notes: Major feature: needs new API + cart model that supports mixed line items

Title: QR-based access enforcement per service area
Description: Ride / locker / costume areas should reject QR that doesn't include that service in the booking
Notes: Currently only ride access-log enforces this; locker and costume have no QR check

Title: Locker QR scan endpoint missing
Description: Scan mode 'locker' in scan page just acknowledges; no API to verify locker assignment by booking QR
Notes: Create /api/v1/scan/locker POST endpoint

Title: Costume QR scan endpoint missing
Description: Scan mode 'costume' in scan page just acknowledges; no API to verify costume rental by booking QR
Notes: Create /api/v1/scan/costume POST endpoint

Title: ref prop collision (React reserved keyword)
Description: prop named 'ref' was intercepted by React before reaching component — receiptRef always undefined — receipt fetched as /receipts/undefined
Notes: Fixed in this session: renamed to receiptId

Title: POS and QR Scanner not visible in admin nav
Description: Admin users visiting /admin/* never saw POS or QR Scanner links
Notes: Fixed: added Terminal group with POS Terminal + QR Scanner links

Title: QR Scan not visible to scan-role staff
Description: QR Scan nav item missing; only showed for admins
Notes: Fixed: added QR_SCAN_ROLES and ScanLine icon to nav item

Title: Gate entry API created
Description: POST /api/v1/scan/gate marks booking CHECKED_IN; idempotent; date-validates
Notes: Implemented in this session

Title: Scan lookup API created
Description: GET /api/v1/scan/lookup returns full booking + validity + rideUsage before operator confirms
Notes: Implemented in this session

Title: Comprehensive QR scan page created
Description: Mode selector gate/ride/locker/costume/info; two-phase lookup+confirm flow; ride usage display
Notes: Implemented in this session

Title: Per-ticket-type quantity selector
Description: Replaced adult/child model with individual +/- counters per ticket type
Notes: Implemented in previous session

Title: Low-stock / availability dashboard for lockers
Description: No aggregate view showing available vs. assigned vs. maintenance count per zone
Notes: Admin page exists but may lack summary widgets

Title: Low-stock alerts for costumes by category and size
Description: No mechanism to flag when a costume size is out of stock
Notes: Needs: inventory count query + alert threshold

Title: Food item stock tracking entirely missing
Description: FoodItem.isAvailable is boolean only; no quantity or depletion tracking
Notes: Schema change required: add stockQuantity field

Title: Loyalty points expiry not enforced
Description: LoyaltyTransaction model exists but no cron/job to expire points
Notes: Needs: scheduled job to mark expired points and reduce balance

Title: Work order SLA escalation not implemented
Description: WorkOrder status machine exists but no SLA breach detection or escalation notifications
Notes: Needs: cron job or trigger to check overdue work orders

Title: No double-click protection on locker release
Description: Release button can be clicked twice before response arrives creating duplicate transactions
Notes: Fix: disable button while request in-flight

Title: No double-click protection on costume return
Description: Return button can be clicked twice before response arrives
Notes: Fix: disable button while request in-flight

Title: App URL hardcoded with localhost fallback
Description: process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL ?? 'http://localhost:3000' — email QR link broken in production if env not set
Notes: Move to required env var with build-time check

Title: Default mobile '9000000000' used as fallback
Description: When guest doesn't provide mobile, API receives '9000000000' which passes validation but is fake data
Notes: Make mobile truly optional in both UI and API; store null instead of fake number

Title: Auto-reset timer hardcoded to 7 seconds
Description: 7000ms timer before scan page resets is hardcoded; should be a configurable park setting
Notes: Minor; move to constant or settings

Title: Cart does not support add-on services (locker/costume/food) as line items
Description: Currently cart only supports ticket types; bundle purchase requires separate terminals
Notes: Needs: new CartItem type with serviceType discriminator

Title: QR code content is plain JSON — not signed/encrypted
Description: Anyone who reads the QR can craft a fake QR with a valid bookingNumber
Notes: Consider HMAC-signed payload or at minimum server-side validation of all fields

Title: Camera-based QR scanning not supported
Description: Scan page only accepts typed/keyboard-wedge input; no camera scan option for mobile staff
Notes: Add HTML5 camera QR scanning using jsQR or @zxing/browser
